text:
Market today: The mood is cautious, with trade tensions and tariffs taking center stage, but the real driver for your names is the ongoing AI narrative.

Your holdings: QQQ (-2.6%) and SMH (-12.19%) are showing weakness and are marked SELL. SOXL (-46.24%) is deep in the red, and its leveraged nature amplifies drawdowns. QQQI (-3.79%) also needs attention.

Watch: Keep an eye on how the AI chip story unfolds, especially with Alphabet's news.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your risk in the leveraged and tech names, as the market navigates trade headwinds.
plays: Trim QQQ if it breaks below 670.
Consider trimming SMH if it shows further weakness below 540.
No new buys today - hold and watch.
